source_filing: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 31, 2025)
original_text: Sales increased 12% in 2025, compared to the prior year. Changes in foreign exchange rates increased net sales by $4.4 billion in 2025.
modified_text: Amazon reported that consolidated net sales increased 17% in 2025 compared to the prior year, while changes in foreign exchange rates increased net sales by $4.4 billion in 2025.
claim: Amazon's consolidated net sales increased 17% in fiscal 2025 versus the prior year, with favorable foreign exchange rates contributing $4.4 billion to net sales.
citation_as_written: Amazon.com, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 (MD&A, Results of Operations — Net Sales)
notes: Sharp-pattern fabrication: the source pairs '12%' with '$4.4 billion'. Only the percentage was altered (12% -> 17%) while the adjacent FX dollar figure was left intact, creating an internal inconsistency between the consolidated growth rate and the stated FX contribution. The source value is 12%.
